text: AI Engineer - Build production LLM applications using LangChain, LangGraph, and RAG pipelines. Design prompt engineering strategies, implement vector search with Chroma/Pinecone, integrate Anthropic Claude and OpenAI GPT models, deploy to AWS. Strong Python required. Experience with LangSmith evals and observability a plus.

Senior Machine Learning Engineer to own end-to-end model lifecycle. Train and fine-tune deep learning models in PyTorch, deploy via SageMaker, build feature stores, automate MLOps with Kubeflow. Production experience with model monitoring, A/B testing, and CI/CD required.

Full Stack Developer to build customer-facing dashboards. React + TypeScript on frontend, Node.js/Express backend, PostgreSQL. Containerized with Docker, deployed on AWS ECS. GraphQL APIs, REST integrations, unit + integration tests with Jest.

Data Engineer to build scalable ETL pipelines processing millions of transactions daily. Python + PySpark for transformations, Airflow orchestration, dbt for modeling, Snowflake warehouse. Real-time streaming via Kafka. Strong SQL required.

DevOps Engineer to own infrastructure. Kubernetes clusters on EKS, Terraform IaC, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines, Prometheus + Grafana observability. Linux administration, networking, security best practices. On-call rotation.

Backend Engineer for distributed systems team. Java + Spring Boot microservices, Kafka event streaming, MongoDB for persistence, Redis caching, gRPC internal APIs, deployed on Kubernetes. Design for scale (10M+ RPS) and high availability.

Senior Data Scientist to drive product decisions through experimentation and modeling. Design A/B tests, build causal inference models, communicate insights to executives. Strong stats foundation, Python (Pandas/scikit-learn), SQL, BI tools (Tableau/Looker).

Frontend Engineer for fast-growing SaaS product. Next.js + React + TypeScript, Tailwind for styling, Zustand state management. Component library in Storybook, E2E tests with Playwright. Deployed on Vercel. Strong eye for UX and performance.

Senior MLOps Engineer to scale ML platform. Kubeflow pipelines, MLflow tracking, Triton inference server, GPU cluster orchestration. Optimize model serving latency, build feature platform. Python + Go, Terraform infrastructure.

AI Research Engineer to advance LLM training. PyTorch + Transformers, DeepSpeed/FSDP distributed training, CUDA kernel optimization. Familiar with recent papers (DPO, RLHF, mixture-of-experts). Publish-or-perish but applied focus.

Senior Cloud Architect to design multi-cloud solutions for enterprise clients. AWS + Azure + GCP, Terraform IaC, Kubernetes orchestration, VPC networking, IAM, encryption at rest/transit, FinOps for cost optimization. Client-facing role.

SRE for high-throughput trading platform. Linux internals, Python + Go scripting, Kubernetes operations, Prometheus alerting, distributed tracing. Lead incident response, chaos engineering exercises, capacity planning.

Mobile Engineer to ship cross-platform apps. React Native + TypeScript, native iOS/Android modules when needed, GraphQL APIs, Firebase backend, Expo deployment pipeline. App Store + Play Store release management.

Senior Security Engineer to secure financial platform. Penetration testing, OWASP Top 10, K8s security (Falco, OPA), SAST/DAST integration in CI/CD. Cryptography, key management, SOC2 + PCI-DSS compliance. Incident response leadership.

NLP Engineer to extract structured data from clinical notes. spaCy + Hugging Face Transformers, fine-tune BERT/BioBERT for NER, medical entity extraction. PyTorch, GPU training. HIPAA-compliant data handling.

GenAI Engineer to build LLM-powered products. LangChain + LangGraph orchestration, RAG with Pinecone/Chroma, prompt engineering, OpenAI + Anthropic APIs, Streamlit demos. Ship fast, evaluate rigorously.

Senior CV Engineer for autonomous vehicle perception. PyTorch + OpenCV, YOLO/Detectron2 object detection, 3D point-cloud processing, CUDA + TensorRT optimization, ROS integration. Real-time constraints, safety-critical.

Senior Platform Engineer to build internal developer platform. Go for tooling, Kubernetes + Helm, Terraform multi-account, ArgoCD GitOps, AWS, OpenTelemetry observability stack. Self-service deployments for 100+ engineers.
Quant Developer for systematic trading strategies. C++ for low-latency execution, Python (NumPy/Pandas) for research, kdb+/q for tick data. FIX protocol, Linux performance tuning, multithreading.

Tech Lead for 8-engineer team. System design at scale, distributed systems expertise, polyglot (Java + Python), strong mentorship and architectural decision-making. Drive technical roadmap, code review culture, hiring.

Junior Software Engineer (new grad) to join product team. JavaScript + React frontend, Node.js backend, SQL databases, REST APIs, Git workflow. Bootcamp / CS degree, internship experience a plus. Mentorship provided.

Prompt Engineer to optimize LLM application quality. Design prompt templates, build eval harnesses (LangSmith/Promptfoo), run A/B tests on prompts, fine-tune via DSPy. Deep familiarity with Claude + GPT model quirks.

Senior AI PM to own GenAI product line. Define LLM-powered features, work with AI/ML engineers, run user research, A/B tests, manage stakeholder expectations on AI capabilities + limitations. AI ethics + safety awareness required.
Senior DB Engineer to scale PostgreSQL fleet. Query optimization, partitioning, logical replication, sharding strategies, Linux performance. Python automation, on-call. Multi-petabyte scale.
Game Developer for mobile multiplayer title. Unity + C#, shader programming, 3D math, multiplayer networking (Photon/Mirror), performance optimization for low-end Android. Ship updates monthly.
Embedded Engineer for IoT product. Bare-metal C on ARM Cortex-M, FreeRTOS, peripherals (I2C/SPI/UART), Linux kernel modules. Python for tooling. JTAG/logic analyzer debugging.
AI Engineer Intern (final-year student / new grad). Build LLM demos in Streamlit, experiment with LangChain + RAG, learn prompt engineering rigor. Strong Python, eager to learn, ship code daily.
Solutions Engineer for dev-tools company. Help enterprise customers integrate our API, write technical guides, run workshops, debug production integrations. Python + JS, SQL, strong communication.

Senior Blockchain Engineer for DeFi protocol. Solidity smart contracts, Foundry/Hardhat testing, EVM internals. Rust for performance-critical components. Security-first mindset, prior audit experience.

Technical Writer for developer documentation. Write API reference + tutorials, contribute code samples in Python/JS, maintain Docusaurus site. Strong information architecture, diagramming (Mermaid/Excalidraw).
